Name: Conduct 50+ detailed interviews with target users (Series A-C startups and experienced CXOs)
Create a comparative matrix of competitors (e.g., Toptal, Catalant, Chief, InterimExecs) focusing on their value propositions, pricing models, customer feedback, and technological capabilities.
Identify 3-5 gaps in competitors’ offerings, such as lack of AI-driven matching, limited onboarding support, and inadequate performance tracking tools.
